dailyNews.title: Jean Smart admits she mistook serious symptoms for being in ‘crappy shape’ before emergency heart surgery
dailyNews.description: "Hacks" star Jean Smart reveals she finished filming a scene before heading to the hospital, where she learned she needed a triple bypass surgery.

dailyNews.title: Miner rescued alive after spending nearly 2 weeks trapped underground in flooded area
dailyNews.description: A Mexican miner was rescued after spending 13 days trapped underground, officials said, while one miner was found dead and another remains missing.

dailyNews.title: Former top MLB pick Mickey Moniak makes bold sacrifice claim as Rockies seek to snap yearslong playoff drought
dailyNews.description: Former No. 1 MLB Draft pick Mickey Moniak said he’d cut off his finger to play in a postseason game after setting a career high in home runs last season.

dailyNews.title: GOP lawmaker introduces bill to strip asylum from fraudsters who vacation in countries they 'fled'
dailyNews.description: Rep. Tom Tiffany introduces the SAFER Act after Soleimani's niece was arrested over an allegedly fraudulent asylum claim filed in Los Angeles.

dailyNews.title: Kevin Hart caddies for Bryson DeChambeau in Augusta National debut, delivering hilarious Par 3 Contest moments

CBS News' Elizabeth Palmer and Olivia Rinaldi report, and Retired U.S. Navy Vice Admiral Robert Murrett joins with more insight.
